narrative:
Ashtabula City has 9,447 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.3 percentage points.
